title: Rich Crunchy High-Protein Middle Eastern Fish Stir-fry
description: This meal-prep dish features a rich and crunchy texture with high-protein fish, combined with aromatic spices for an authentic Middle Eastern flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Pat fish dry with paper towels.
Season cod fillets with lemon juice and a pinch of salt. Drizzle with olive oil.
Place in a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes or until cooked through, turning once midway.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and kasir pepper flakes. Stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Remove fish from oven. If desired, use an immersion blender to puree some of the cooking juices into a smooth sauce. Alternatively, reserve the liquid in small bowls for drizzling over fish later.
Once garlic is aromatic, add pomegranate molasses and stir well. Add cooked fillets, mixing thoroughly to coat evenly with flavorful marinade. Garnish with chopped dill and cilantro leaves.
Serve immediately while hot or store leftovers in an airtight container for up to 3 days. Enjoy this as a high-protein meal prepped option.
